name: Honey Queen Kisses
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and add the honey, a small amount at a time, creaming after each addition.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each.
3. Sift together the dry ingredients and sift into the creamed mixture, blending well.
4. Add coconut, chips, and cereal. Fold until well blended.
5. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Bake for 12 minutes at 350°F. Yield: 5 dozen.
